_description: Unsigned transaction fixture for the Necklace TS tx builder, including the explicit visible Necklace flat-fee output. Structure derived from Pearl source; concrete byte values are ILLUSTRATIVE (regtest) and should be regenerated/verified against pearld once a live regtest is available.
_source: wallet/wallet/txauthor/author.go (NewUnsignedTransaction, wire.TxVersion=1), wallet/wallet/createtx.go, wallet/wallet/txsizes/size.go (P2TR sizes, vsize), wallet/wallet/txrules/rules.go (FeeForSerializeSize, DefaultRelayFeePerKb=1000), node/wire/msgtx.go

_signingContext._note: prevValue is committed in BIP-341 sighash and MUST be supplied to the signer
_signingContext._tapscriptRootNote: null = standard BIP-86 key (no commitment). If the address carries an XMSS commitment, this is the 32-byte tapscript root used to tweak the Schnorr key on the key-path spend (RawTxInTaprootSignature).

outputs.label: ILLUSTRATIVE - NECKLACE FLAT FEE (explicit, visible, shown before signing)
outputs._policy: Flat PRL amount, above dust floor (~546 Grain), rendered to the user as a separate line item before they approve signing. Never hidden.

outputs.label: ILLUSTRATIVE - change
outputs._note: Change is a P2TR output to a wallet-derived BIP-86 change address; position randomized before signing (RandomizeChangePosition). Omitted if it would be dust.

feeAccounting._networkFeeDerivation: networkMinerFee = ceil(relayFeePerKb * vsize / 1000); relayFeePerKb default 1000 Grain/kB; vsize from txsizes.EstimateVirtualSize (1 P2TR in + 3 P2TR outs). 150000 is illustrative.

sighash.algorithm: taproot key-path; commits version, locktime, all input outpoints+values+scripts, all outputs
sighash._note: TS port computes this via @scure/btc-signer / @noble equivalents; pin to KAT once regtest pearld is available.
